event_description: A global summit exploring how artificial intelligence, IoT, and data analytics are transforming urban infrastructure, reducing carbon footprints, and improving quality of life in modern smart cities.
sample_starters: How do you think AI-driven traffic optimization could realistically cut city emissions in the next decade?
Which city do you think is leading the way in sustainable AI deployment, and what can others learn from it?
I've been reading about sensor networks in Barcelona – what tech stack excites you most in smart city projects?

event_description: A conference bringing together clinicians, engineers, and investors to discuss the latest breakthroughs in digital health, wearable diagnostics, telemedicine, and AI-assisted drug discovery.
sample_starters: What do you think the biggest regulatory hurdle is for getting AI diagnostics into clinical practice?
Have you seen any wearable data being used effectively in clinical trials?
I'm curious about your take on federated learning for hospital data – privacy vs. model accuracy trade-off?

event_description: An industry forum for developers, regulators, and financial institutions to explore decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols, tokenization of real-world assets, and compliance in the Web3 ecosystem.
sample_starters: Do you think layer-2 scaling solutions have finally solved the blockchain trilemma, or is there still a missing piece?
How are you approaching KYC/AML compliance in your DeFi projects without compromising decentralization?
I noticed more institutional players at this event – do you see traditional finance and DeFi converging soon?

event_description: An event for educators, curriculum designers, and technology providers exploring adaptive learning systems, gamification, generative AI tutors, and the evolution of online credentialing.
sample_starters: Do you think AI tutors can ever replicate the mentorship aspect of a great teacher?
What's your experience with learner engagement in fully asynchronous online courses?
I've been experimenting with generative AI for personalized curricula – what guardrails do you think are essential?

event_description: A hands-on expo showcasing the latest in industrial robotics, autonomous mobile robots (AMRs), cobots, and human-robot collaboration technologies across manufacturing and logistics sectors.
sample_starters: What's the most surprising application of collaborative robots you've come across recently?
How do you see vision-language models changing robot programming and deployment?
I'm curious how your team handles edge-case scenarios in unstructured warehouse environments.

event_description: A security-focused summit examining zero-trust network architectures, AI-driven threat detection, ransomware mitigation strategies, and post-quantum cryptography readiness.
sample_starters: How close do you think enterprises are to achieving genuine zero-trust maturity versus just checking compliance boxes?
Are you seeing AI being used offensively in attacks more than defensively in your environment?
Post-quantum cryptography timelines feel abstract – are you already migrating any critical systems?

event_description: A forward-looking forum connecting cleantech startups, energy companies, and policymakers to discuss renewable energy deployment, carbon capture, grid modernization, and climate finance.
sample_starters: Which carbon capture technology do you think has the most credible path to gigaton-scale deployment?
How do you evaluate the real additionality of voluntary carbon credits in your investment thesis?
Grid-scale storage has been a talking point for years – what's your read on iron-air batteries vs. pumped hydro right now?

event_description: A practitioner-focused conference covering the full spectrum of modern data science: MLOps, feature engineering, causal inference, real-time analytics, and responsible AI practices.
sample_starters: What's your current MLOps stack, and what's the one tool you'd recommend to any team starting fresh?
Have you applied causal inference methods in a production model, or is it still mostly research for you?
Responsible AI checklists feel like theater sometimes – what practices actually change outcomes in your experience?
